scenarios.title: Cold start before authoritative evidence

initial_truth.authority: engine startup and first coherent status snapshot
initial_truth.condition: launcher is visible but no authoritative engine snapshot or fresh reading has arrived

scenarios.operator_question: Has authoritative startup evidence arrived, and what is safe to inspect next?
scenarios.operator_task: Identify that readiness, safety and recording are not yet known; open startup or component evidence without initiating control.

expected_visible.truth: Engine authority has not yet been established; last-known or seeded values are not current evidence.
expected_visible.reason: No coherent engine snapshot and freshness timestamp have been received.
expected_visible.action: Wait for bounded startup evidence or open component diagnostics and the startup runbook.

scenarios.title: Engine and command authority disconnected

initial_truth.authority: engine process, readings stream and command server health
initial_truth.condition: GUI remains open after engine data and command paths are lost

scenarios.operator_question: Which authority path is unavailable, and what remains last-known only?
scenarios.operator_task: Distinguish engine, reading-stream and command-path loss; find the documented local recovery route without assuming plant state.

expected_visible.truth: Current plant, safety and persistence truth are unavailable; retained values are historical context only.
expected_visible.reason: The engine snapshot and command channel are disconnected and freshness has expired.
expected_visible.action: Open component health and the engine-disconnect runbook; use only an explicitly offered confirmed local restart action.

scenarios.title: Critical channel is stale

initial_truth.condition: a required critical channel has a last-known value but no fresh update

scenarios.operator_question: Which critical value is stale, and does it block readiness?
scenarios.operator_task: Locate the stale critical channel, its observation age, readiness impact and instrument drill-down.

expected_visible.truth: The displayed value is last-known, not current, and the required-channel check blocks readiness.
expected_visible.reason: The channel freshness deadline expired without an authoritative replacement sample.
expected_visible.action: Open the contributing instrument and freshness evidence; do not begin the run.

scenarios.title: Run blocked by unsafe preconditions

initial_truth.condition: verified-OFF is confirmed, but the named non-output readiness blocker keithley_not_connected is active

scenarios.operator_question: Why is the run blocked, and which check must be resolved?
scenarios.operator_task: Identify the authoritative blocker, reason, evidence age and documented readiness-evidence path.

expected_visible.truth: Verified-OFF is confirmed, but run permission is denied by a distinct non-output readiness check.
expected_visible.reason: SafetyManager reports Keithley not connected; the authoritative keithley_not_connected blocker prevents readiness independently of verified-OFF.
expected_visible.action: Open instrument-connectivity evidence; keep the unavailable control hidden until the backend clears the blocker.

scenarios.title: Acknowledge an active alarm without clearing truth

initial_truth.authority: canonical alarm state and acknowledgement audit
initial_truth.condition: an active unacknowledged alarm is present while its triggering condition remains

scenarios.operator_question: What is being acknowledged, and what truth remains active afterward?
scenarios.operator_task: Review alarm identity, cause and onset; request acknowledgement and verify that active condition and audit evidence remain visible.

expected_visible.truth: Acknowledgement records operator awareness; it does not clear the alarm condition or recover safety state.
expected_visible.reason: The alarm source remains active after the acknowledgement audit transition.
expected_visible.action: Open the alarm cause or runbook after acknowledgement; use Safety Recovery separately if applicable.

scenarios.title: Reasoned recovery from fault-latched safety state

initial_truth.authority: SafetyManager fault latch, recovery preconditions and verified-OFF evidence
initial_truth.condition: safety is fault_latched after a recorded trip and recovery preconditions are not yet confirmed

scenarios.operator_question: Why is safety latched, and what reviewed recovery step is available?
scenarios.operator_task: Read the latched reason and preconditions, distinguish safety recovery from alarm acknowledgement, and prepare a reasoned acknowledgement request without energizing hardware.

expected_visible.truth: Safety remains fault-latched until authoritative preconditions and acknowledgement succeed.
expected_visible.reason: The recorded trip and/or verified-OFF recovery evidence has not completed the safety FSM transition.
expected_visible.action: Open Safety Recovery, inspect preconditions and submit the documented reason only when the backend permits it.

scenarios.title: Cooldown trajectory deviates from evidence

initial_truth.authority: cooldown trajectory, source freshness, baseline and alarm state
initial_truth.condition: fresh measured cooldown diverges from baseline and an attention item is active

scenarios.operator_question: Is cooldown off trajectory, why, and where is the evidence?
scenarios.operator_task: Identify the deviation, contributing channels, confidence/freshness and the correct analysis or alarm drill-down.

expected_visible.truth: Cooldown is active and durably recording, but the measured trajectory is outside the accepted baseline evidence.
expected_visible.reason: A named deviation verdict and contributing source values exceed the reviewed tolerance.
expected_visible.action: Open the cooldown mission evidence and related alarm; do not infer or initiate a corrective command.

scenarios.title: Persistence or archive path degraded

initial_truth.authority: persistence-first writer, durable timestamp, backlog and disk health
initial_truth.condition: live acquisition may continue but persistence authority is unavailable or refusing writes

scenarios.operator_question: Are readings durably recording, and what storage action is safe next?
scenarios.operator_task: Determine durable-recording truth, the first affected timestamp and the documented storage recovery/drill-down.

expected_visible.truth: Visible or incoming samples are not proof of durable recording while persistence authority is failed.
expected_visible.reason: The writer, disk or archive integrity check reports a blocking failure with a bounded evidence time.
expected_visible.action: Open data-integrity evidence and the storage runbook; preserve source data and do not claim recording.

scenarios.title: Passive support node is degraded

initial_truth.condition: a compressor, pump, cryocooler or support node reports degraded health without control authority

scenarios.operator_question: Which support component degraded and what capability is affected?
scenarios.operator_task: Identify the component, freshness, impacted capability and passive diagnostic/runbook path without expecting any device-control command.

expected_visible.truth: A named passive infrastructure component is degraded; telemetry provides read-only evidence and no device-control authority.
expected_visible.reason: The component reports a reviewed health reason and affected capability with fresh provenance.
expected_visible.action: Open component diagnostics or its runbook and coordinate the documented external response.

scenarios.title: Active experiment shift handover

initial_truth.authority: experiment state, durable events, attention queue and operator log
initial_truth.condition: an experiment continues across a shift boundary with one unresolved non-blocking attention item

scenarios.operator_question: What run is active, what remains unresolved, and what must the next shift know?
scenarios.operator_task: Identify experiment/phase, durable recording state, highest unresolved attention item and last handover note; prepare a bounded handover record.

expected_visible.truth: The named experiment remains active and durably recording with one visible unresolved caution.
expected_visible.reason: The attention queue and last durable operator note identify the outstanding handover item.
expected_visible.action: Open the handover timeline and append a scoped operator note; do not alter phase or safety state.

scenarios.title: Historical replay cannot become live authority

initial_truth.authority: replay source identity, recorded timestamps and command exclusion
initial_truth.condition: historical readings are replaying through the normal display path

scenarios.operator_question: Is this historical replay or live plant truth, and can it authorize action?
scenarios.operator_task: Identify replay mode, original source time/provenance and the absence of live safety/control authority.

expected_visible.truth: Displayed readings are historical replay evidence and cannot establish current readiness, safety or live recording.
expected_visible.reason: The snapshot provenance and mode identify a bounded replay source rather than a live engine authority.
expected_visible.action: Use replay analysis and review drill-downs only; keep live hazardous controls unavailable.

scenarios.title: Capture bounded support evidence while degraded

initial_truth.authority: support-bundle capability, component health and redaction policy
initial_truth.condition: a non-safety component is degraded while bounded local evidence remains available

scenarios.operator_question: Can bounded redacted evidence be captured while the system is degraded?
scenarios.operator_task: Preview bundle scope, capture it explicitly, and verify deterministic manifest/redaction results without blocking acquisition or claiming recovered state.

expected_visible.truth: Support evidence can be captured independently of recovery, with missing and stale sources declared.
expected_visible.reason: The bundle preview lists bounded sources, redactions, integrity results and unavailable evidence.
expected_visible.action: Confirm capture, preserve the manifest/hash result and share it through the documented support path.
